title: OrePacks Mod
description: A Mod focused on ores and exploration, adds ores, armor, tools, biomes and a new dimension :)
body:
This mod adds ores, armor, tools, biomes and a dimension, most ores have some type of equipment or armor.

There are some normal ores that can be craft into armors, tools or even other ores like: 

-Tin (common)
-Ruby (Rare, better than diamond gears)
-Platinum (Rare, Same level than diamond gears)
-Fossil (Common but only found on desert biomes)
-Cobalt (Realy Rare, found in snowy biomes)
-Malachite (A little Rare but only useful for a helmet)

Lead is used for replacing iron in crafts, and also have its own crafting station, armor and tools.

Uranium is a radioactive fuel but only used for "Lead Factory".

Cinnabar and Orpiment are rare toxic gems with a special sword and a battle axe

Rhodium is used to make a "Rhodium Rod" that replaces sticks in high level tools

And we also have end game ores that are way better than diamond and netherite :)

-Vibranium (Found in "Vibranium Forest")
-Endrite (Found in the end, really rare)
-Adamantion (Found in "Vibranium Forest")
-Soul Ingot (Made with many nether components)
-Magma Rock (Made with nether components)
-Blazed Ingot (made with nether componants)

-Crocidolite (Final ore,rare ore used for the last upgrade for "Soul Ingot")

2 New biomes to explore!

-Vibranium Forest
-Dead Forest

The Mining Dimension for Dreamers is a new dimension that helps players to mine without having to worry about destroying the world, only dangers nearby are lava pools due to high temperature sky.

How to use "Lead Factory" and which ores use it: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aSP7T8YEUXM
